desc.en: The Dubai Metro is not only the backbone of the city's transportation but also one of the world's most advanced driverless rail systems. Since its launch in 2009, it has become the preferred mode of  travel for residents and tourists alike, known for its punctuality, cleanliness, and efficiency. Whether you're commuting daily or exploring as a tourist, the Dubai Metro offers comfortable and reliable service.
desc.zh: 迪拜地铁不仅是城市交通骨干，更是全球最先进的无人驾驶铁路系统之一。自2009年开通以来，它已成为居民和游客出行的首选方式，以其准时、清洁和高效著称。无论您是日常通勤还是旅游探索，迪拜地铁都能提供舒适可靠的服务。
